docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYE, ELISHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYE, ARDEANOUS $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $10.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,010.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. BENCH LETTER IS WITHDRAWN. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAID JUDGMENT CREDITOR $3000 BY CASHIER'S CHECK IN COURT TODAY. JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND JUDGMENT DEBTOR APPEARED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYE, ELISHA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2013 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MAYE, ELISHA
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MAYE, ARDEANOUS HEARING SET FOR NOV-09-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ARDEANOUS MAYE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON ORDER OF EXAMINATION. JUDGMENT CREDITOR PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYE, ELISHA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-05-2016 - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MAYE, ARDEANOUS

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYE, ELISHA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYE, ELISHA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL MAU. FILED BY MAYE, ELISHA MAYE, ARDEANOUS

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2016 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-06-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. NO APPEARANCE BY THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. COPY OF PROOF OF SERVICE RECEIVED IN COURT. ORIGINAL PROOF OF SERVICE NOT FILED BY SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERKS: L. FONG AND S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2015 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-04-2016. "PARTIES AGREED ON PAYMENT PLAN. DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $100 PER MONTH, STARTING 12/1/15 ON THE 1ST OF EVERY MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL. COMPLIANCE HEARINGS EVERY 6 MONTHS--NO APPEARANCES, IF PAYMENTS ARE BEING MADE", PER PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE OEX. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MAYE, ELISHA AS TO DEFENDANT MAYE, ARDEANOUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILLIGENCE (ORDER OF EXAMINATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYE, ELISHA
DECLARATION OF ADDRESS UPDATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYE, ELISHA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$10.00) SERVED JUL-23-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAYE, ARDEANOUS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MAYE, ARDEANOUS HEARING SET FOR MAY-16-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO AREANOUS MAYE, 18 LONGVIEW, PACIFICA CA 94015
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYE, ELISHA

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2016 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-05-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "THE INSTALLMENT PAYMENT PLAN IS TERMINATED", BY JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. BENCH LETTER ISSUED ON 5/16/16 IS WITHDRAWN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2016 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-12-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ELISHA MAYE. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR ARDEANOUS MAYE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER BENCH LETTER ISSUED. CASE CONTINUED TO JANUARY 12, 2017 AT 11:00 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
